LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descript: Replace the tires with deep treaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Off-road tires
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descript: Increase the amount of cargo that can be hauled by this vehicle.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Expanded cargo space
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descrip: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descript: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descript: Change the exhaust system of the vehicle into a more efficient one, decreasing the visibility of the vehicle and improving fuel efficiency.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Improved exhaust
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descript: Improve the engine to significantly improve acceleration rate of the vehicle.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Extended engine
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descript: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descript: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descript: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descript: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descript: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_BangBus_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descripti: Cover the engine with extended armor plating, protecting it from gunfire.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Engine cover
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descripti: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descript: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.descript: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descripti: Improve the armor of the treads by covering them in thick steel plating.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Armored treads
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descripti: Increase the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more precise shots over significantly longer distance, but decreasing the rotation speed of the cannon.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Long barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descripti: Change the fuel injection system and install a barrel choke to allow the tank to fire long range explosive flame projectiles instead of a stream of fire.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Launcher barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descripti: Decrease the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more rapid shots at the cost of precision and range. The reduced weight of the turret allows for faster rotation speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Short barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descripti: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descripti: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descripti: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descripti: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descr: Cover the engine with extended armor plating, protecting it from gunfire.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Engine cover
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descr: Reinforce the front bumper to allow this vehicle to deal more damage during collisions.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Reinforced bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.desc: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descr: Extend the cabin by adding space for an additional passenger.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Larger cabin
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descr: Replace the tires with deep treaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Off-road tires
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descr: Improve the turret with more efficient firing mechanism and ammo feeding system, allowing it to fire more rapidly and with higher accuracy. Additionally, install smokepop canisters on a turret, allowing the vehicle to eject a smoke screen.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Improved turret
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descr: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descr: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descr: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descr: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descr: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.description: Attach two big chemfuel canisters to the bottom of the vehicle to allow it to travel greater distances without the risk of running out of fuel.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Big chemtanks
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.description: Increase the amount of cargo that can be hauled by this vehicle, and add two additional passenger slots.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Expanded cargo space
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descriptio: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.description: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.description: Replace the tires with deep threaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Off-road tires
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.description: Elevate the engine to improve its efficiency at the cost of exposing it to damage.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Exterior engine
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.description: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.description: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.description: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.description: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.description: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descript: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descript: Replace the tires with deep treaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Off-road tires
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descrip: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descript: Mount thick steel chains around tires, preventing them from slipping on icy surfaces and greatly improving winter travel speed. The additional grip slightly increases acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Chained tires
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descript: Install a spoiler to boost the maximum speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Spoiler
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descript: Install an autonomous mini-turret at the front of the vehicle. Requires steel to refurbish
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Mini-turret
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descript: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descript: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descript: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descript: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descript: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descrip: Cover the engine with extended armor plating, protecting it from gunfire.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Engine cover
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descrip: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descri: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.descri: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descrip: Extend the cabin by adding space for an additional gunner, with all the required apparatus.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Gunner seat
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descrip: Improve the armor of the treads by covering them in thick steel plating.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Armored treads
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descrip: Increase the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more precise shots over significantly longer distance, but decreasing the rotation speed of the cannon.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Long barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descrip: Decrease the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more rapid shots at the cost of precision and range. The reduced weight of the turret allows for faster rotation speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Short barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descrip: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descrip: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descrip: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descrip: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descri: Reinforce the front bumper to allow this vehicle to deal more damage during collisions.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Reinforced bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descri: Construct a steel, lightweight cargo rack on the roof of the vehicle to increase the cargo capacity.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Cargo rack
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descr: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.descr: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.label: Fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descri: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descri: Replace the tires with deep threaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Off-road tires
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descri: Install a spoiler to boost the maximum speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Spoiler
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descri: Install a supercar engine, greatly increasing movement speed and acceleration of the vehicle at the cost of fuel efficiency.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Supercar engine
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descri: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descri: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descri: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descri: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Traveller_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Acceleration
